code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut start = -1
  while i <= n
    mut is_space = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          is_space = true
        else
          is_space = false
        end
      when None
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_space
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn filter_gt(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  while i < n
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > t
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let nums = parse_ints(line1)
      match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
      when Some(t)
        let result = filter_gt(nums, t)
        print("#{result}\n")
      when None
        print("\n")
      end
    when None
      print("\n")
    end
  when None
    print("\n")
  end
end
